name: Debbie Harry
description: American singer, songwriter and actress, frontwoman of Blondie (born 1945)
abstract: Deborah Ann Harry (born Angela Trimble; July 1, 1945) is an American singer, songwriter and actress, best known as the lead vocalist of the band Blondie. Four of her songs with the band reached No.
